response.original_title: The Legend of the White Snake: Fahai
response.overview: young master from a noble family, who meets Bai Youyou (played by An Chenxin ), a chivalrous woman, amidst the chaos of war . The two go through many trials and tribulations in their love story, and Qin Zijing eventually transforms into a green snake
response.title: The Legend of the White Snake: Fahai
